description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and uploads a Python package to PyPI. The workflow should trigger on push and pull request events. It should have three jobs: build_wheels, build_sdist, and upload_pypi. The build_wheels job should run on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04, windows-latest, and macos-latest, and build wheels for Python 3.7 using cibuildwheel. The build_sdist job should run on ubuntu-latest and build a source distribution using setup.py. The upload_pypi job should upload the artifacts to PyPI when a tag starting with 'v' is pushed.
